resources.string: Input is empty, please enter a number

Laundry Calculator is an application specifically designed to simplify the estimation of laundry service costs.

 This app helps users and laundry business owners instantly calculate the total price based on the weight of the laundry and the selected service type (Regular or Express), complete with an additional option for ironing.

 Built using modern Android technologies (Kotlin & Jetpack Compose), this application prioritizes a clean, functional, and user-friendly interface.
